title: Validating a Complex JSON Schema
scenario: Generate a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce a JSON schema that validates a complex structured data type, including nested objects, arrays, and additional properties. The schema should be under 200 lines of code, use the 'properties' keyword, and include a description of each field. Ensure the LLM output is syntactically correct and adheres to standard JSON schema best practices.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON schema meets the constraints provided, including line count and keyword usage.
Verify that the generated JSON schema is syntactically correct and free of errors.
Check if the generated JSON schema accurately represents the complex structured data type, including nested objects, arrays, and additional properties.
